# mtncloud_credential (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud credential by name. Secret material is never returned.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_credential" "registry" {
  name = "docker-registry"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the credential to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the credential.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the credential is enabled.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the credential.
- `type` (String) Credential type code.
